description: Hill-climbing optimized context templates and facets for Firestore MongoDB dialect e-commerce dataset

templates.nl_query: Find all orders with a priority of 1.
templates.intent: Find orders matching priority equal to 1, handling both integer 1 and string '1' polymorphism
templates.manifest: Find orders matching a priority number, checking both integer and string formats

parameterized.parameterized_intent: Find orders matching priority equal to $1, checking both integer $1 and string '$1'

templates.nl_query: Find the customers who are active.
templates.intent: Find active customers defined as customers whose stats.last_order_date is on or after 2024-02-05
templates.manifest: Find active customers based on recent last_order_date threshold

parameterized.parameterized_intent: Find active customers with stats.last_order_date on or after $1

templates.nl_query: Find orders paid by credit card.
templates.intent: Find orders with payment.method equal to credit_card (snake_case with underscore)
templates.manifest: Find orders by payment method credit_card

parameterized.parameterized_intent: Find orders with payment.method equal to $1

templates.nl_query: Find all products that are black.
templates.intent: Find products with attributes.color equal to Black (capitalized Color name)
templates.manifest: Find products by capitalized color attribute

parameterized.parameterized_intent: Find products with attributes.color equal to $1

templates.nl_query: Count the total number of orders.
templates.intent: Count total number of orders in the database

templates.nl_query: How many orders are there for each status?
templates.intent: Count number of orders grouped by status
templates.manifest: Count number of orders grouped by status

parameterized.parameterized_intent: Count number of orders grouped by status

templates.nl_query: List all orders placed by customer cust_001.
templates.intent: List all orders placed by customer cust_001
templates.manifest: List all orders placed by a specific customer ID

parameterized.parameterized_intent: List all orders placed by customer $1

templates.nl_query: List all products in the Electronics category.
templates.sql: db.products.aggregate([{ "$match": { category: "Electronics" } }, { "$sort": { product_id: 1 } }, { "$project": { product_id: 1, name: 1, price: 1, _id: 0 } }])
templates.manifest: List products in a given category

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.products.aggregate([{ "$match": { category: "$1" } }, { "$sort": { product_id: 1 } }, { "$project": { product_id: 1, name: 1, price: 1, _id: 0 } }])

templates.nl_query: What is the total revenue from all orders?
templates.intent: Calculate total revenue sum across all orders
templates.manifest: Calculate total revenue sum across all orders

parameterized.parameterized_intent: Calculate total revenue sum across all orders

templates.nl_query: What are the 3 most expensive products?
templates.sql: db.products.aggregate([{ "$sort": { price: -1 } }, { "$limit": 3 }, { "$project": { product_id: 1, name: 1, price: 1, category: 1, _id: 0 } }])
templates.intent: List the top 3 most expensive products
templates.manifest: List top N most expensive products

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.products.aggregate([{ "$sort": { price: -1 } }, { "$limit": $1 }, { "$project": { product_id: 1, name: 1, price: 1, category: 1, _id: 0 } }])
parameterized.parameterized_intent: List the top $1 most expensive products

templates.nl_query: Find all customers who have enabled email notifications.
templates.intent: Find customers with preferences.notifications.email set to true
templates.manifest: Find customers who enabled email notifications

parameterized.parameterized_intent: Find customers who enabled email notifications

templates.nl_query: Get all products made by TechBrand.
templates.intent: Find products with attributes.brand equal to TechBrand

templates.nl_query: Find all customers with a home address in New York.
templates.intent: Find customers matching address type home and city New York
templates.manifest: Find customers matching home address type and city

parameterized.parameterized_intent: Find customers with address type $1 in city $2

templates.nl_query: List all orders that contain the product prod_001.
templates.intent: Find orders containing product with items.product_id equal to prod_001
templates.manifest: Find orders containing specific product ID in items array

templates.nl_query: Calculate the total quantity sold for each product across all orders.
templates.intent: Unwind order items and aggregate total quantity sold per product_id
templates.manifest: Aggregate total quantity sold per product across all orders

parameterized.parameterized_intent: Aggregate total quantity sold per product across all orders

facets.intent: active customers who placed orders recently
facets.manifest: active customers with recent last order date threshold

parameterized.parameterized_intent: active customers with last order date on or after $1
